metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the emobility domain.

children.name: Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway
children.description: Securely connects to chargers via OCPP/OCPP-compliant protocols and manages real-time device interactions.

internalModules.title: Contract and Mapping Layer
internalModules.description: Maintains schemas, field mappings, and versioned contracts used by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

internalModules.title: Transformation and Routing Engine
internalModules.description: Transforms messages and routes requests or events through Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

internalModules.title: Access and Observability Controls
internalModules.description: Applies authentication, throttling, retry handling, and monitoring for Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

interfaces.title: Inbound API
interfaces.description: API entry point used to submit requests or payloads into Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

interfaces.title: Outbound Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event or webhook surface used by Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway to publish downstream updates.

interfaces.title: Partner Connector Surface
interfaces.description: Connector interface for external systems exchanging data through Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway.

children.name: Charge Point Management
children.description: Platform tools for commissioning, configuring, monitoring, and maintaining large inventories of EV charge points and network assets. It supports multi-tenant and global scale management. (CP Management product) :contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

internalModules.title: Core Domain Engine
internalModules.description: Implements the main business logic and lifecycle handled by Charge Point Management.

internalModules.title: Rules and Administration
internalModules.description: Provides the configuration, rules, and administrative controls required by Charge Point Management.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Exception Handling
internalModules.description: Supports visibility, diagnostics, and manual handling of exceptions in Charge Point Management.

interfaces.title: Service API
interfaces.description: API surface for interacting with the business capabilities implemented by Charge Point Management.

interfaces.title: Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: User interface for administration and operational control of Charge Point Management.

interfaces.title: Domain Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes notable business changes from Charge Point Management.

children.name: Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations
children.description: Provides real-time visibility, diagnostics, alerting, and remote actions across deployed infrastructure.

internalModules.title: Signal Ingestion and Processing
internalModules.description: Collects operational and business signals that feed Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

internalModules.title: Metrics and Decision Engine
internalModules.description: Calculates insights, KPIs, forecasts, or scores produced by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Operations Workspace
internalModules.description: Presents actionable views, alerts, and drill-down workflows for Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

interfaces.title: Dashboard Interface
interfaces.description: Interactive reporting or control surface that presents insights from Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

interfaces.title: Metrics and Query API
interfaces.description: API for retrieving metrics, scores, forecasts, or analytical outputs from Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

interfaces.title: Alert and Signal Feed
interfaces.description: Event or notification interface exposing operational signals generated by Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations.

children.name: Session Orchestration
children.description: Manages charging sessions end-to-end including start/stop actions, status correlation, and session data aggregation.

internalModules.title: Workflow and State Engine
internalModules.description: Orchestrates the main lifecycle, state transitions, and task flow handled by Session Orchestration.

internalModules.title: Capacity and Exception Management
internalModules.description: Manages inventory, reservations, workload, and exception handling inside Session Orchestration.

internalModules.title: Operations Console Logic
internalModules.description: Supports operator actions, escalations, and manual interventions required by Session Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Workflow API
interfaces.description: API for starting, updating, or querying operational workflows managed by Session Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Operator Console
interfaces.description: User interface for task handling, interventions, and operational control within Session Orchestration.

interfaces.title: Lifecycle Status Events
interfaces.description: Event stream exposing state changes and exceptions produced by Session Orchestration.

children.name: Fleet Management
children.description: Tools tailored to support charging operations for vehicle fleets, including usage tracking, driver assignments, and billing incentives. (Fleet Management product) :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}

internalModules.title: Core Domain Engine
internalModules.description: Implements the main business logic and lifecycle handled by Fleet Management.

internalModules.title: Rules and Administration
internalModules.description: Provides the configuration, rules, and administrative controls required by Fleet Management.

internalModules.title: Reporting and Exception Handling
internalModules.description: Supports visibility, diagnostics, and manual handling of exceptions in Fleet Management.

interfaces.title: Service API

interfaces.title: Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: User interface for administration and operational control of Fleet Management.

interfaces.title: Domain Event Feed
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes notable business changes from Fleet Management.

children.name: Driver Authorization Service
children.description: Validates tokens, RFID users, and credentials to authorize EV drivers to start charging with policy checks.

internalModules.title: Identity and Policy Engine
internalModules.description: Authenticates actors, evaluates access policies, and manages trust rules for Driver Authorization Service.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and Lifecycle Management
internalModules.description: Manages roles, permissions, account state, and lifecycle changes within Driver Authorization Service.

internalModules.title: Audit and Compliance Controls
internalModules.description: Records security-relevant actions and compliance evidence produced by Driver Authorization Service.

interfaces.title: Authentication API
interfaces.description: Programmatic interface for authentication, authorization, or account checks exposed by Driver Authorization Service.

interfaces.title: Administration Console
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing identity settings and access policies in Driver Authorization Service.

interfaces.title: Audit Event Stream
interfaces.description: Event interface that publishes security and compliance signals from Driver Authorization Service.

children.name: Tariff & Pricing Management
children.description: Supports flexible tariff creation, pricing schemes, dynamic pricing, and contract-level rate plans. (Billing & Payments product) :contentReference[oaicite:4]{index=4}

internalModules.title: Rules and Configuration Model
internalModules.description: Defines the configurable policies, thresholds, and business rules for Tariff & Pricing Management.

internalModules.title: Decision Evaluation Engine
internalModules.description: Executes policy and pricing decisions in real time within Tariff & Pricing Management.

internalModules.title: Simulation and Override Controls
internalModules.description: Supports testing, exceptions, and operator overrides for Tariff & Pricing Management.

interfaces.title: Decision API
interfaces.description: API that returns policy, quote, or eligibility outcomes calculated by Tariff & Pricing Management.

interfaces.title: Configuration Workspace
interfaces.description: Operational interface for managing rules, policies, and overrides in Tariff & Pricing Management.

interfaces.title: Policy Change Events
interfaces.description: Event stream that communicates policy updates and decision outcomes from Tariff & Pricing Management.

children.name: Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger
children.description: Converts metered energy data into billing quantities, applies tariffs, and maintains a financial ledger for reconciliation.

internalModules.title: Transaction and Ledger Core
internalModules.description: Records the core financial or commercial transactions handled by Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger.

internalModules.title: Settlement and Reconciliation
internalModules.description: Matches external outcomes, balances, and exceptions flowing through Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger.

internalModules.title: Billing Rules and Controls
internalModules.description: Applies pricing, billing, tax, or financial control logic inside Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger.

interfaces.title: Transaction API
interfaces.description: API surface for submitting or retrieving financial transactions handled by Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger.

interfaces.title: Finance Operations Workspace
interfaces.description: User interface for reconciliation, exception handling, and financial oversight in Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger.

interfaces.title: Settlement and Ledger Events
interfaces.description: Event stream carrying posting, settlement, and status changes from Metering, Rating & Transaction Ledger.

children.name: Billing, Invoicing & Settlement
children.description: Generates invoices, manages payments, supports pre/post-paid models and settlement between parties. (Billing & Payments product) :contentReference[oaicite:5]{index=5}

children.name: Partner Management

internalModules.title: Onboarding and Performance Workflows

internalModules.title: Commercial and Compliance Controls

interfaces.title: Partner Lifecycle Events

children.name: EV Driver App
